title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: DUFUR SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, dental, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 802 NE 5th Street Dufur, OR 97021 Eligibility: Students grades K-12 in Dufur School District and their family members Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 8am-1pm and 1:30pm-5pm (541) 386-2304 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 386-2304 Main phone Main phone (541) 386-2304 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Wasco County (Dufur School District only) SITE HOURS: Monday/Thursday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DUFUR SBHC
